name: Exelixis
confidenceReason: Deep value (PEG ~0.8, FCF yield ~7.5%) but severe single-asset Cabometyx reliance. Pipeline failure kills growth narrative entirely.
bullCase: A classic value anomaly. A highly profitable, cash-generating oncology firm trading at deep value multiples. It absorbs macroeconomic volatility shocks that typically devastate high-beta tech holdings.
bearCase: Severe single-asset reliance on Cabometyx. If pipeline assets fail, the growth narrative dies.
